author: davion-knight
title: Hybrid depth-then-breadth miner
notes: Self-contained stdlib agent. Spends 2 of its 3 inference calls on full-depth audits of the top-ranked contracts (whole-file context, no truncation) and 1 call on a batched breadth pass over the next tier, staying inside the 3-call/24k-token per-problem budget. Emits matcher-shaped high/critical findings; degrades gracefully on 429/errors.
